programs.programName: Kentucky Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS) Waivers

verified.notes: Kentucky operates multiple HCBS waivers with different eligibility criteria. Data provided is for the HCB (Home and Community Based) Waiver specifically, which serves elderly (65+) or disabled adults. No minimum age requirement exists for the HCB Waiver itself, but the program targets 65+ or disabled populations. Income limit is 300% of Federal Benefit Rate (2026: $2,982/month). Asset limit is $2,000 for single applicants; for couples, each spouse can have $2,000 but joint assets are considered. Phone number is for Department for Aging and Independent Living (DAIL), which co-operates the HCB waiver. Other Kentucky HCBS waivers (e.g., CHILD Waiver for under-21, DD waivers) have different eligibility criteria not fully detailed in search results.
